faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

faqs.question: Does Daswani Dental College and Research Centre provide good placement facilities?
faqs.answer: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre has received an impressive review rating of 3.67 on Placements based on 3 feedback of verified Shiksha students.

faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Daswani Dental College and Research Centre?
faqs.answer: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is a well-known institution for MDS, BDS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Daswani Dental College and Research Centre has course specializations in Prosthodontics, Oral Pathology , Periodontology, Oral Medicine & Radiology, Orthodontics , Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery.

faqs.question: Is Daswani Dental College and Research Centre worth considering?
faqs.answer: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is a distinguished institution offering MDS, BDS. Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Daswani Dental College and Research Centre has received an impressive review rating of 3.73 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.67 for Campus Life, 3.67 for Placements, 3.67 for Faculty, and 3.67 for Infrastructure.
A:    The fees structure for programs offerred by the Daswani Dental College and Research Centre is INR 600000 - INR 1950000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied by the college.

review_content.Placements: About 100 students get placed every year. The average package lies between INR 50,000 and INR 100,000. The highest one can get is about INR 1000000. There are various hospitals that require a dental surgeon, including emergency rooms. The top roles offered are dental supervisor, emergency, minor, and major.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are pretty big. Library, Wi-Fi, computer lab, microbiology lab, pathology lab, mess, canteen, medical shop, etc. are available. The quality of food is good in both the mess and the canteen. Basketball court, volleyball court, football ground, Cricket ground, and CCTV are present.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure and teachers are good, hostel is disappointing, and campus is huge.

review_content.Placements: In our college, almost 100% of students are placed in each batch. The salary package is not offered at any of our BDS colleges. We have to open a clinic or find a government job. The college provides you with enough education to open a clinic. The college may have some staff seats available if you have good knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi or gym facilities are not available in the boys' hostel. Each room has two students. Rooms with attached bathrooms or common bathrooms are available. Both facilities have different charges. The infrastructure of hostels is not very satisfactory. The canteen is small and the mess food is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the course but the location of campus is at far distance.

review_content.Placements: The College offers internship after completing the course. It is a one year internship. The batch consists of 100 students. Each divided into 10 groups for internship. Each batch is posted in the given branches of dentistry to master it. Patient flow is also good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The College has great infrastructure and campus. It has various departments designed to showcase each branch of dentistry. The hostels are also good. College also provides mess facility. The College also provides grounds for various sports activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college to take admission.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides an opportunity to become a gentle doctor. They teach us a lot. I recommend students who want to complete their graduation and become a dentist to opt for this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus has a huge space. There are 24x7 facilities of anything like food, water supply and personal hostels for students. They have a well-arranged library which I like the most. Our college is the topmost in Kotak Rajasthan, and I recommend this college to others. The environment at our college is also good.
review_content.Faculty: Nowadays, the requirement of a doctor is more, and the dentist is not a bad job. The dentist is respected and honoured personal in society, and also the dentist can earn a good amount of money.

cut_off.college_name: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre Cutoff 2025: Check NEET UG Round Wise Ranks

description: Daswani Dental College and Research Centre cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Daswani Dental College and Research Centre NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 635223 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Daswani Dental College and Research Centre BDS cutoff 2025 was 635223 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1155075 for admission to the BDS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Daswani Dental College and Research Centre accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
The institute accepts admission to BDS on the basis of NEET UG cutoff ranks, followed by Rajasthan NEET UG counselling.
In Round 1 the BDS Cutoff 2025 was, 633283, whereas in Round 4 the cutoff was, 635223 for the students belonging to the General AI category.
Students can refer to the table below to know more about other categories, courses, and quota cutoff data for 2025, 2024, and 2023.

faqs.answer: A:    Bharti Group of Institutions has placed its selected students in known and reputed companies such as Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Foxagle Web Solution, Excelling 3Dp Pvt Ltd, Deloitte And Touche Assurancr Enterprise Risk And Services India Pvt Ltd, Aaru Spring Machinery, R Seenuvasan, Isi India Private Limited, Mortgage World, Cummins India Ltd Korhrud Pune, Staff Nurse.

faqs.answer: A:    Bharti Group of Institutions has been rated 3.1 on placements.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Bharti Group of Institutions?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bharti Group of Institutions offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, M.Pharma and PGDCA. Bharti Group of Institutions courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Bharti Group of Institutions courses stands around INR 1,10,000 to 1,31,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Bharti Group of Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, NCTE, INC, PCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at Bharti Group of Institutions goes up to 1039.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Bharti Group of Institutions?

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the finest colleges in Chhattisgarh.

review_content.Placements: I don't get any placement in any company though I gave 3 interviews in campus selection. But only for the experience. Most companies visited the campus are a startup company. I received a good amount of experience in giving interviews. And I also gain practical knowledge about working in the Company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Each block is allotted for different branches of engineering and medical branches. The college is surrounded naturally. It has a separate entrance for faculty and students. Each building has more than 5 floors, and it looks very attractive from far. The college is spread over more than a thousand acres.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Bharti College of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for computer science and IT departments only. It is moderate for the ENTC department. There are no placements for mechanical and civil departments. So, if you are taking admission in CSE or IT department, you have chances to get placed. Placements are good enough compared to other private colleges of Rajasthan and north region colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is according to the fee that they charge. It is moderate. The college has all the basic facilities that are required in a college. You cannot expect the infrastructure of our college to be like VIT and SRM. They are working hard on improving its infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in few areas on the campus. Its speed is very poor, so you cannot expect much about it.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

overview_faqs.question: Is Bharti Group of Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Bharti Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for BCA, D.Ed, B.Pharma, B.Tech, PGDCA, UG Diploma, B.A.M.S., B.Sc., B.Ed, D.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in IT & Software, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, Science, Nursing. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Bharti Group of Institutions has a review rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.6 on campuslife, 3.1 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Bharti Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery (B. A. M. S.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Sports and extracurricular activities are not held properly here.

content.Placements: About 50-60% of students get placed in the college. The lowest salary offered ranges from Rs. 15,000-25,000 per month, and the highest salary offered ranges from Rs. 90,000 to 1 lac per month. Many companies like BHU, Patanjali, Himalaya, Kama Ayurveda, etc., visit the college for placements. Almost 90-100% of students get an internship in government hospitals. A top role offered is a medical officer.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are well maintained. Classrooms are good, and all classrooms have a projector. The library is good. Girls hostel is average, but boys hostel is not good. The quality of food served in a mess is average. Two canteens are available on campus. Sports facilities are not good in our college, but medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: It is a well-developed college campus.

content.Placements: In our course of civil engineering, more than 40% of the students got placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 12,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 4,000 per month. Almost 70% of the students from our batch got an internship from college. Many companies provided internships to our college students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college facilities are very good, and they provide Wi-Fi for students for the study purpose. There is a well-developed library with thousands of books. Hostel rooms are a bit small, and in one room, 2-3 students are placed. Canteen and medical facilities are also very good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the finest colleges in Chhattisgarh.

content.Placements: I don't get any placement in any company though I gave 3 interviews in campus selection. But only for the experience. Most companies visited the campus are a startup company. I received a good amount of experience in giving interviews. And I also gain practical knowledge about working in the Company.
content.Infrastructure: Each block is allotted for different branches of engineering and medical branches. The college is surrounded naturally. It has a separate entrance for faculty and students. Each building has more than 5 floors, and it looks very attractive from far. The college is spread over more than a thousand acres.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Bharti College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for computer science and IT departments only. It is moderate for the ENTC department. There are no placements for mechanical and civil departments. So, if you are taking admission in CSE or IT department, you have chances to get placed. Placements are good enough compared to other private colleges of Rajasthan and north region colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is according to the fee that they charge. It is moderate. The college has all the basic facilities that are required in a college. You cannot expect the infrastructure of our college to be like VIT and SRM. They are working hard on improving its infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is available in few areas on the campus. Its speed is very poor, so you cannot expect much about it.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: If you are looking just for a degree, then join this college.

content.Placements: Companies visit the campus rarely, and hardly anyone gets placed. The placement rate is very low. Students should not expect placements from this college. If you are looking for placements, it's better not to join this college. There is no placement assistance. You should find jobs on your own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and there are big buildings. Our campus is huge, but there is no playground. There are large buildings, but no facilities are available. The basic facilities are quite good but not extraordinary. There are labs which are barely in working condition.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Himalayan Institute of Pharmacy and Research, Dehradun offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Some teachers are very good, knowledgeable and helpful, but management is very poor.

review_content.Placements: No companies come to our college for placements. Our college only sends students in pool campus placements in other colleges, and they even don't help to reach there. Faculty members help, but management is very poor. In our 4th year, none of the companies came for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good, but it is just average. Facilities are not good in the hostel. The canteen infrastructure is good, but the food is not good. Our campus has a playground, but it is not equipment. The library is average, but the management is very poor.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Students college life will be ruined if they take admission here.

review_content.Placements: No placement company has ever come to our college in our 4 years of college life. Our college hasn't even taken us on the industrial trip. Students have to find internships on their own, and our college only gives the form of internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is poor, and the food is also bad. There is Wi-Fi which is down most of the time. Complaining doesn't help, and our college doesn't do anything. I suggest not to opt for the hostel. The mess was clean when it was new. Now it is old, and it is like every other mess canteen. You can get uncooked potatoes and bad roti.

review_summary.college_name: Himalayan Institute of Pharmacy and Research, Dehradun Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely value for money and more than that value for time.

content.Placements: There is no placement in the college. Other than that, the faculty is really awesome, very supportive, and helpful. The infrastructure and labs are too good. Laboratory practicals are performed on a daily basis for the development of the practical temperament of students.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. Hostel rooms are satisfactory, separate rooms are there for every student, and also Wi-Fi is available for students residing there. The college canteen's food is pretty good and there are lots of varieties for the whole week.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Some teachers are very good, knowledgeable and helpful, but management is very poor.

content.Placements: No companies come to our college for placements. Our college only sends students in pool campus placements in other colleges, and they even don't help to reach there. Faculty members help, but management is very poor. In our 4th year, none of the companies came for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not that good, but it is just average. Facilities are not good in the hostel. The canteen infrastructure is good, but the food is not good. Our campus has a playground, but it is not equipment. The library is average, but the management is very poor.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Students college life will be ruined if they take admission here.

content.Placements: No placement company has ever come to our college in our 4 years of college life. Our college hasn't even taken us on the industrial trip. Students have to find internships on their own, and our college only gives the form of internships.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is poor, and the food is also bad. There is Wi-Fi which is down most of the time. Complaining doesn't help, and our college doesn't do anything. I suggest not to opt for the hostel. The mess was clean when it was new. Now it is old, and it is like every other mess canteen. You can get uncooked potatoes and bad roti.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members and environment.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very poor. Students need not depend on the college placements as there are good opportunities outside the college in the pharma industries located near the college. The average salary offered is nearly Rs. 15,000 per month initially. It will increase with time and knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not much good. The college provides different labs for different subjects. Hostel facility is very good, but the seats are limited. The food served is good. It is located out of the city. The surroundings provide the best environment to study.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

reviews_list.review_title: The perfect hub of technology .

review_content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Tech, and the academics are so good that most of the students get placement from campus. There are around 80 percent of students who get placement from the campus. The highest package is 50 LPA in my course. The top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Wipro, Accenture, Yahoo, Zomato, Swiggy, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University Gurugram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college for a technical course.

content.Placements: In my course, mostly 70% of students get placement. The highest package offered is 21 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zomato, Microsoft, Wipro, and LinkedIn. Top roles offered by the companies are telecalling, web development, data analysis, and purchase assistance.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. There is Wi-Fi available in all classes, and the seminar halls are wide and have enough space for 200 students to be seated at once. Also, there are clean corridors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good in infrastructure, syllabus, and they conduct excellent training every semester.

content.Placements: Well, it's better not to hope for even a single percent from this college, as barely anyone gets selected on campus because barely any companies come, and even if they do, they pay too little. There is no such top recruiting company. If I named them, everybody would say they have heard about this company for the first time, and it’s too hard to find them on Google, too. The top role offered in my course is web development.
content.Infrastructure: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The perfect hub of technology .

content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Tech, and the academics are so good that most of the students get placement from campus. There are around 80 percent of students who get placement from the campus. The highest package is 50 LPA in my course. The top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Wipro, Accenture, Yahoo, Zomato, Swiggy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best budget-friendly colleges, with job opportunities, and a great environment.

content.Placements: One of the best campuses in Haryana to pursue B.Tech. Healthy environment and good jobs. The placement scenario for the CSE branch here is excellent. In our batch, I would say around 85-90 percent of students who sat for placements got placed. The college's placement cell works tirelessly from the third year itself. The salary packages are very encouraging. The highest package went to a remarkable 50.5 LPA (an exceptional off-campus placement), while the lowest is around 3.5 LPA. The average package for our CSE branch is comfortable between 5.5 LPA and 6 LPA, which is a fantastic start. Top recruiting companies visit our college.

admission_overview.college_name: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University Gurugram Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SVSU admission is open. At SVSU students are offered various programmes at the UG, PG diploma and certificate levels. The university provides courses in the fields ofTechnology,Management,Commerce,etc.SVSUaccepts students primarily on an entrance basis. The admission process is online.

SVSU course admissionis primarily entrance-based. The university also accepts students on a merit basis for a few of its courses. The university offers a variety of specialisations for its programmes. Interested students can refer to the following table to learn more about the eligibility and selection details for theSVSU courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

SVSU course feesvary according to the programme and specialisations selected by the students. The fee is inclusive of several components such as admission fee, lab fee, medical insurance and other components. Students can pay the fee either semester-wise or yearly. Find below theSVSU feefor some of its popular courses:
Course Name
Tuition Fee

SVSU seat intakediffers from course to course. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the accepted entrance exams. Participating in the counselling process is mandatory for seat allotment. Check below given table to know aboutSVSU seat intakefor some of its popular programmes:
Course Name

SVSUreserves seats for various categories. To avail of the reservation students must submit the required documents at the time of admission. Aspirants can refer to the following table to learn aboutSVSU seat reservationfor various categories:
10% of Haryana Open Gen. Category

Theadmission procedure of SVSUinvolves multiple steps like application, selection and admission confirmation. The admission criteria for the preferred course is satisfied before applying for it. Check below for the steps to completeSVSU admission process:
SVSU Application Process
To apply for the preferred course at SVSU, visit the official website and fill the application form available. Fill in all the specified information.
Selection Process
Students are shortlisted on the basis of their entrance exam score. The university accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for UG and PG course admissions.
Admission Confirmation
To confirm their seat at the university, students must pay the admission fee and go through the verification (if required).
For more information about Shri Vishwakarma Skill University check out the below video:

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in BTech at Shri Vishwakarma Skill University?
faqs.answer: No, Shri Vishwakarma Skill University does not accept direct admission for its BTech programme. To be eligible for the course, candidates must pass Class 12 in the Science stream from a recognised board. Additionally, students also need to appear and clear the accepted entrance exam. The university considers score obtained in the JEE Main exam. Students need to participate in the HSTES counselling for theSVSU BTeach seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech in Shri Vishwakarma Skill University?
faqs.answer: To start the admission process for BTech at Shri Vishwakarma Skill University, you have to visit the official website. Please review the admission terms and conditions.Now, you have to complete the application form online. Pay the application fee of INR 1000 (non-refundable).Wait for the announcement of the merit list and based on that you will be invited for the counseling process.During the process, you can discuss the course preferences with the college.

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 431813 and 1193744 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. reviews.review_heading: The best college for a technical course.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. reviews.review_text: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Echelon Institute of TechnologyReviewed on 14 Jan 2026)

Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in General Medicine - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I will definitely recommend this college for the course. It is a place with minimal distractions.

review_content.Placements: All 5 candidates from my batch were doing well in clinical practice at their respective places. The average package per month was around 1.5LPA to 2.5LPA with the opportunity to earn more by doing more evening practice. There were good opportunities to do online consultations.
review_content.Infrastructure: A good AC library was available in our college. Department infrastructure was just average. Hostel infrastructure was average. There was no restriction on keeping extra things like a refrigerator washing machines etc. They charge you a lot for the electricity bill. The mess food was average but I never got sick because of the mess food.

review_summary.college_name: KLE College of Pharmacy, Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and faculty.

content.Placements: 0% of students were placed in this course. The highest package was 2 lakh, and the lowest was 1 lakh sixty-five thousand. Cipla and other good companies hire for our course. Many students secured internships in various companies, like Cipla and Cetaphil. There are many roles in pharmacy, but the top one is a pharmacist.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities at our college are lacking, and the infrastructure is poor. Wi-Fi is not available, and the library is too small. Hostel facilities are inadequate; the hostel does not have its mess hall, and we have to adjust to everytime, and there is no ground in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmacology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I was so happy that I got the admission in KLE College.

content.Placements: There is no need for campus placement in the college because all students get placed very well as they pass out. Currently, all are in a good position having CTC of more than 5-10 LPA. There are huge job opportunities on the campus. So we can easily get a job after completion of our course even in research and development.
content.Infrastructure: Campus life is amazing. The gender ratio is around 40:60. During recess time students associate with some sports events. They increase the morale of students and support them in state and national-level competitions. We did not face any problems like ragging or any other as I am from North India.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: A few students got placed in our college. The highest salary package is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Zydus Pharma, and Cipla. They provide few placement opportunities. Top roles offered are research, development, quality manager, etc. The placement cell is working hard for better requirements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Our college provides us with all the facilities. Labs are well-equipped with new technology. Our college is well-maintained and clean. The digital library is provided with unlimited Wi-Fi. All books are provided in the library. They provide sports and games facilities. A gymnasium is available in our college. The infrastructure of the hostel is good. The food served in the hostel is not good. Around 3 students can stay in each room.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent course.

content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements. Top recruiting companies like Cipla, Himalaya, etc., visit our campus. All students are placed in very good companies with good salary packages. Each course has a different salary package.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is good. It has various facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, a digital library, classrooms, and a well-developed lab. We have good cultural and sports facilities. The canteen is good but a bit small. Medical facilities are available.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.A.M.S. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir offers MD. The fees for Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir courses range between INR 43,500 to 63,225.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: When we ask for help regarding practical material from the college authorities, they refuse to help.

review_content.Placements: I am still studying here. I have heard from my seniors who have performed well in academics that they were not having any trouble in recruitment. They get stipend of around 17000 INR per month. For internships also, we have to spend 6 month in an Ayurvedic hospital and 6 months in allopathic.
review_content.Infrastructure: No proper hostel facilities are there. There were 23 students in one hall, nothing more is available except for a hospital bed to live. Labs are also lacking the instruments required. No cadavers are present in the college for anatomy practicals. Only 2 microscopes among 75 students are given.

faqs.answer: Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.A.M.S.Candidate shall have passed Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any recognised Board with Physics, Chemistry and Biology, and shall have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry and Biology. In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes.
Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur
Result awaited candidates can also apply.

description: Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to various UG and PG courses. In the meantime, candidates who are seeking admission can check the sections below to view the Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, categories, and rounds. A few more updates are given below:

The Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir BAMS Cutoff 2024 has been released for Round 3. The cutoff for the BAMS was released as opening and closing ranks for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD categories. According to Round 3 Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir AYUSH NEET UG cutoff 2024, for the AI quota, closing rank for General category students was 71656. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery.

Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir cutoff 2024 has been released, for it's third round for the candidates seeking admission to the NEET UG course. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 3 Seat Allotment Result, the most competitive course was BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery with a cutoff rank of 71656 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

Government Ayurvedic College, Balangir admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG ranks, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

review_content.Placements: Still there are no outgoing batch was established. As it was a new campus with five year dueling course. Hence 2023 will be first outgoing batch but college doesn't guarantee any jobs or placement as it is a government college. Hence it's all upto student to get job.
review_content.Infrastructure: Building infrastructure for hostels are yet to be construed. But academic building is likely to get completed soon and On going classes and all departments are shifted from old leased building to new campus.
review_content.Faculty: Academics are really very good with practical exposure Hence all students here can get valuable knowledge with atmost practical knowledge Curriculum is good with wellplanned schedule. Every student can enjoy his college life here with gaining stuff from books.

On the other hand, MTech is offered across two specialisations, namely Civil Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lamrin Tech Skills University offers undergraduate, postgraduate, certificate and diploma courses across streams, including Engineering, Business Administration, Computer Applications, Physical Education and Phsiotherapy, among others. The duration of the UG courses is 3 to 4 years while the PG course duration is 2 years. Students can check the Lamrin Tech Skills University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering(Core) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the faculty members and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 85% of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 12 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package ranges from 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting company for my course is IBM. 75% of students got internships from my course in IBM company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good and labs are also good. Classrooms are big enough for 65 students. The library is also equipped with nice books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports and games are also held in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Finance and Capital Market - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of the emerging university Lamrin Tech Skills University.

review_content.Placements: About 60-70% of students get placed in our college. Students get placed based on their performance in college. The highest package is 20 LPA. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our course are IBM, Tata, Infosys, etc. According to my research, 100% of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has every facility like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. It is open for every course. Any student can get access easily. Facilities provided in our hostel are good but the mess food is not much good just eatable. Medical facilities are available. Sports events happen occasionally.

review_summary.college_name: Lamrin Tech Skills University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering in Collaboration with IBM - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is quite satisfying because of faculty, curriculum, and tie-ups with multiple companies.

content.Placements: Actually, our college's first batch will pass out in 2026, so I can't say the exact packages yet. However, the university has multiple tie-ups with companies, so the chances of placement are high. Some students have also got paid internships. The top companies include IBM, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The university infrastructure is quite satisfying. Multiple labs are available for different departments. The university also provides a library free of cost. Reading rooms are available 24/7 for students, but need permission from the HOD.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering in Collaboration with IBM - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering is collaborated with IBM in LTSU.

content.Placements: Currently, in our university, there are no placement records because this university was established on 09 December 2021, and no batch has been passed out. It has a good collaboration with the industry, like the tech giants. IBM is the anchor partner, and Tata Technology is also its industry partner. Several other companies like L&T Edutech, Efos, railway, etc., are collaborating with it.
content.Infrastructure: There are many things, but the main focus is the IBM innovation center which is available 24x7, so we use the lab whenever we want. Hostel facilities are good, and it has full-time Wi-Fi access. The mess is clean and hygienic. It provides a decent quality of meals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering(Core) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of the faculty members and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 85% of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 12 LPA. The lowest package is 3 LPA. The average package ranges from 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting company for my course is IBM. 75% of students got internships from my course in IBM company.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good and labs are also good. Classrooms are big enough for 65 students. The library is also equipped with nice books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports and games are also held in college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Finance and Capital Market - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of the emerging university Lamrin Tech Skills University.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of students get placed in our college. Students get placed based on their performance in college. The highest package is 20 LPA. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our course are IBM, Tata, Infosys, etc. According to my research, 100% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: It has every facility like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. It is open for every course. Any student can get access easily. Facilities provided in our hostel are good but the mess food is not much good just eatable. Medical facilities are available. Sports events happen occasionally.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering(Core) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Lamrin Tech Skills University review.

content.Placements: They assure 100% placements. The college doesn't have a placement record yet but they guarantee 100% placements. IBM is the main force leading B.Tech students. They assure more than 8 LPA average package. They assure 1.5 years of internships and industry exposure. Many renowned personalities are called for lectures on various issues.
content.Infrastructure: There is a good huge campus area. All the basic resources are provided like a gym, pool, etc. The campus infrastructure is just average. There is nothing special. Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are provided for students. Medical facilities are good. They have their own medical buses and infirmary rooms. Sports are really good here with boxing and taekwondo also included.

faqs.question: Can I join ISRO after doing Aerospace Engineering?
faqs.answer: For joining ISRO, students have to qualify the exam which is conducted every year. The recruitment for aerospace engineer in ISRO is also through entrance test. Candidates need to score good marks in order to clear the prestigious and competitive exam and work with the ISRO. The recruitment exam for ISRO is highly competitive and they attract the best minds from the country for their aerospace engineering team. Candidates must also have relevant years of experience and demonstrate skills which are required for the job profile.

highlights.description: Lamrin Tech Skills University is one of the India’s top ranked institutes. It is considered as a leading institute by national ranking bodies. As per Outlook 2025, the institute has been ranked #11 under the Skill Universities category. The institute is well known for its excellent academic offerings and top faculty. Candidates can go through the following to know more details around Lamrin Tech Skills University rankings.

outlook.description:
Lamrin Tech Skills University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by Outlook 2024, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel_campus.college_name: Lamrin Tech Skills University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It is quite satisfying because of faculty, curriculum, and tie-ups with multiple companies.
reviews.review_text: The university infrastructure is quite satisfying. Multiple labs are available for different departments. The university also provides a library free of cost. Reading rooms are available 24/7 for students, but need permission from the HOD.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering is collaborated with IBM in LTSU.
reviews.review_text: There are many things, but the main focus is the IBM innovation center which is available 24x7, so we use the lab whenever we want. Hostel facilities are good, and it has full-time Wi-Fi access. The mess is clean and hygienic. It provides a decent quality of meals.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty members and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good and labs are also good. Classrooms are big enough for 65 students. The library is also equipped with nice books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are available in the college. Sports and games are also held in college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the emerging university Lamrin Tech Skills University.
reviews.review_text: It has every facility like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. It is open for every course. Any student can get access easily. Facilities provided in our hostel are good but the mess food is not much good just eatable. Medical facilities are available. Sports events happen occasionally.

reviews.review_heading: Lamrin Tech Skills University review.
reviews.review_text: There is a good huge campus area. All the basic resources are provided like a gym, pool, etc. The campus infrastructure is just average. There is nothing special. Wi-Fi, labs, and a library are provided for students. Medical facilities are good. They have their own medical buses and infirmary rooms. Sports are really good here with boxing and taekwondo also included.

reviews.review_heading: University is about 100 acres of land with a huge ground.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good or medium. Classrooms are huge. The library is huge, and books are always available. Labs are very good with good computer facilities, and in other labs for mechanical and electrical instruments, everything is working. Hostel facilities are very bad, sometimes there is a drinkable water problem, mess problems, and Wi-Fi is not working.

reviews.review_heading: Practical, industry-ready cybersecurity education with vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Lamrin Tech Skills University offers a high-speed internet Wi-Fi network, advanced labs and classrooms equipped with teaching aids. The library has cybersecurity resources and the hostels provide essential services. The mess and canteen serve quality meals. Sports, medical facilities, and a gym enhance campus life, and the college has two large playgrounds where students can play and stay physically fit.

reviews.review_heading: First Tech Skill University in India with 100% placement guarantee.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was amazing and it has all facilities like high-speed wi-fi, a university providing a digital classroom and a very vast library with all types of books available. The university is providing all types of facilities to make a bright future for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Great learning expression
reviews.review_text: Courses are delivered within well-equipped modern classrooms, state-of-the-art laboratories, high-speed WI-FI , and a comprehensive library. Hostels provide comfortable rooms with decent food, basic medical facilities, and sports amenities to further support student life in equilibrium.

reviews.review_heading: Lamrin a future to choose.
reviews.review_text: The hotels are not very lavish but above average where all basic amenities are provided. The campus is centralized wifi. Different room options such as Ac with common bathroom, Ac with bathroom and Non Ac room options are available as per the need of the student.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for payment after placement.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and seminar facilities are all available. All classrooms have good lighting and fans that are always operational, so there are no issues with electricity. We can use unlimited Wi-Fi anytime, and the labs are open at all times, allowing us to study whenever we want.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus life, quality education, good placement, and cultural activities.
reviews.review_text: Lamrin Tech Skills University is a skill-oriented university. It offers many skill-oriented courses, BTech in computer science, in which we have core or specializations like cyber security, data science, artificial intelligence & machine learning, and the internet of things. We have IBM with us as an anchor partner. We have many labs as an IBM lab, designed by IBM, a future skill lab with 24*7 lab service. Highly qualified professionals who teach us. In Lamrin Tech Skills University, there are d...

reviews.review_heading: LAMRIN "A Path to Enlightenment"
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is modern and well-maintained, which is suitable for a learning environment. The decorum of classrooms is also well-maintained to provide good learning. Hostels are good too, providing you with the facilities like Wi-Fi and regular sanitization.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent Faculty, Good and Healthy Food, Lots of Real-Life Project Work, Good Placements
reviews.review_text: Excellent quality. My course likely offers good Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, modern classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostels provide basic facilities, with decent cleanliness. Mess food is usually average but repetitive. Medical facilities and sports amenities are generally available.

reviews.review_heading: A Best College to Pursue Your Life
reviews.review_text: Everything is too good. The hostel rooms are hygienic as well as spacious too. Washrooms are also clean. Pest control is sprayed every 15 days to control the pests. The mess is also spacious, and the quality of food is also nice. Labs are also open 24/7, which eases the work for students on projects.

review_summary.college_name: Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose Institute of Pharmacy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Enjoy Your College Life and Make It the Best Lifetime Memories.

content.Placements: Placement is not too good; the average placement salary is 3 Lacs per annum. Not many big companies come here, but as of 2024, it is considered one of the best colleges. Everybody got placed. Many students go for higher education like a Master in Pharmacy or MPHARM. It’s value for money.
content.Infrastructure: At a low fee, it’s one of the best hostels in West Bengal. At this price, no other hostel facilities are available. Hostel food is not too good, but you get chicken, fish, or egg and dal, rice, and vegetables alternately every day. College classrooms are clean, and the library is also good. Wi-Fi is available all over the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Headline - "Bikram's review on his college NSCBIP" .

content.Placements: Above 75% of students are getting placement. On average, the package is 5-8 LPA. 60% of students get internships in local areas or globally, which is possible. Our faculty members are too good and very helpful to us. It's a ragging-free campus, and all over, its completely recommended.
content.Infrastructure: Fully Wi-Fi-available campus. Faculty members are very helpful. Labs and the library are good. They teaches us from basic level to moderate and high. Too good for students. All campus have free Wi-Fi, free library, etc. Extracurricular activities and e-sports are also there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion this is one of the best colleges.

content.Placements: 60 percentage students are placed in our course. The highest package offers in our course -40 thousand per month and average package-20000 per month and the lowest package 15000 per month. Top recruiting company Bengal chemical. About 50 percent students got internship.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructures are really good there are available such ad-free wi-fi, labs and classrooms are good and also digital classrooms are present there. Hostel facilities such as food quality, room qualities are good and also foods are cheap. Sports and games facilities are available there.

individual_reviews.title: The hostel life at NSCBIP is excellent.

Our college had strong alumni contacts, which helped a lot when getting placed after completing the course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: NSCBIP is the best pharmacy college in West Bengal.

content.Placements: Above 60-80% of students get their job. Many students go to M. Pharma after B. Pharma. We did an industrial visit in the 3rd year. The company where we did our industrial training is IPCA Laboratory Pvt Ltd, Dehradun. Many companies come here for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: Library, classroom, labs facilities are good, also hostel facility, Wi-Fi connection is there. Food is available in the canteen but food quality is really bad, there is little oil in the food. I think this food may be dangerous to our human body. We play in college campus football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, and carrom.

reviews.review_text: At a low fee, it’s one of the best hostels in West Bengal. At this price, no other hostel facilities are available. Hostel food is not too good, but you get chicken, fish, or egg and dal, rice, and vegetables alternately every day. College classrooms are clean, and the library is also good. Wi-Fi is available all over the college.

reviews.review_heading:
Headline - "Bikram's review on his college NSCBIP"
.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi-available campus. Faculty members are very helpful. Labs and the library are good. They teaches us from basic level to moderate and high. Too good for students. All campus have free Wi-Fi, free library, etc. Extracurricular activities and e-sports are also there.

reviews.review_heading: In my opinion this is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructures are really good there are available such ad-free wi-fi, labs and classrooms are good and also digital classrooms are present there. Hostel facilities such as food quality, room qualities are good and also foods are cheap. Sports and games facilities are available there.

reviews.review_heading: The hostel life at NSCBIP is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories were well maintained by management and facility admins. The hostel life at our college was the best part of it. The hostel facilities were good and the food quality was average. The college was far away from the main city, so the transport facilities were weak.

reviews.review_heading: NSCBIP is the best pharmacy college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Library, classroom, labs facilities are good, also hostel facility, Wi-Fi connection is there. Food is available in the canteen but food quality is really bad, there is little oil in the food. I think this food may be dangerous to our human body. We play in college campus football, cricket, volleyball, table tennis, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for building your career in pharmaceutical industries.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs, and we have free Wi-Fi on campus. We also have a boys' common room, gym, and a swimming pool. Students get their essential books from the library free of cost. Hostel is also good. Canteen is available. An ambulance is also available for 24hrs. If you want to play there is a large football field.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good. Placement is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two building. There are separates labs for different streams are there. With good education qualification with proper teaching experience. There way of teaching consist of both theoretical and practical. (which helps us to tracking problem).

review_summary.college_name: Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It comes under India's top 3 physiotherapy colleges.

content.Placements: About 70% of students got placements. The wage depended on how well you excelled in the course, and it was pretty good. Government hospitals and the Indian Athletics team were among the options. I didn't know much, but the placements were very good. Good offers were placed in front of us and the best faculty.
content.Infrastructure: Describing the infrastructure was reasonable since it was a professional course. The library and classrooms were pretty nice and were equipped with everything. Our college offered every opportunity in sports and extracurricular activities. It was the best college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Tour of Sikkim Manipal Institute.

content.Placements: There are 58 students in our classroom. The maximum package for our course is 18 LPA. The top roles offered in our course include Neurophysiotherapist, Sports Physiotherapist, and Physiotherapist for the Pediatric Department. Additionally, being associated with Manipal makes it easier for students from this college to secure jobs in higher organizations.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. It is situated in the lap of mother nature, allowing students to enjoy a natural and peaceful environment throughout their studies. All classrooms are well-equipped, and the library has a wide range of books. However, the quality of food in the mess is not very good, though over time, students get habituated to it.

individual_reviews.title: It has really good infrastructure and is a very satisfying college.

content.Placements: Our course consists of 4 and a half years, where the first 4 years are for theory—2 years for fully theory and 2 years for theory as well as clinical postings. The other half of the year is for internships. In our 2024 batch, we have 55 students in total from different states.
content.Infrastructure: Since I don’t stay in the hostel, I don’t know much about hostel life, but many of my friends who stay there share about it. The courses are pretty good, and we get every opportunity we want, which is really beneficial for us.

highlights.description: Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #4 by the Outlook-ICARE 2025 under the Physiotherapy category. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Physiotherapy' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Physiotherapy' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend. In 2025, Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy's rank is #4, the same as last year's rank in the 'Physiotherapy' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sikkim Manipal College of Physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: Here the infrastructure is really good and this college is situated in the lap of mother nature. The campus is really beautiful, as are the environment. Classrooms are well equipped as per the needs of our course, and the library has a wide range of books. WiFi is available here. Medical facilities are also provided when needed, and a discount is also given for students.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, with a well-maintained library containing almost all the books. I don't stay at the hostel, but my friends say that the hostel rooms are good and the mess food is moderate. It won't give you a home feel, but it's overall good.

reviews.review_heading: SMCPT, in short, is a great college.
reviews.review_text: If you want the best infrastructure, with all the specimens required and amazing classrooms, SMU is the best. I love how they provide specimens for BPT students, which is commonly not available in other colleges, as it is an institute of medical sciences. The availability of everything is 100%, and there are lots of sports events for BPT students too.

reviews.review_heading: Sikkim Manipal University of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a library with a good number of books, so you don't have to buy everything; you can borrow from the library. There are all necessary labs for physiotherapy, and the classrooms are well-equipped. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi connection in the library and in the hostel too. However, the hostel doesn't provide good facilities; for a 3-seater room, it's not very spacious, and the food is not great.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for J.K.K Nattraja Dental College and Hospital admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    J.K.K Nattraja Dental College and Hospital is a well-known institution for B.Sc, MDS, BDS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. J.K.K Nattraja Dental College and Hospital has course specializations in Cardiology Laboratory Technique, Dialysis Technology, Physician Assistant, Respiratory Care Technology, Radiotherapy Technology, Radiology & Imaging Science, Emergency Medical Technology, Operation Theatre Technology, Periodontology, Orthodontics , Prosthodontics.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at J.K.K Nattraja Dental College and Hospital?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Library is satisfactory. Pharmacology and basic sciences staffs are great.

review_content.Placements: They offer regular clinical postings, which will be useful during the internship period. And also internships. A college bus is arranged for postings. Postings are related to our department hospital. The person who takes operation theatre and anaesthesia technology is to maintain OT and assist anesthetist. I have to know how to handle advanced equipment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is nice and protected for girls. Food and water are hygienic. The hostel has free Wi-Fi. A hostel with a gym is available. Ground with a track. Basketball court. Indoors with many games. It has a temple. The hostel has three categories based on food and fees. It is worthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good patient flow.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Food served in the hostel is somewhat good but they don't provide proper food for breakfast and dinner. There is no proper water supply for hostelers for bathing.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good. Students can learn a lot from them. Class tests and seminars are conducted every week. They clear all the doubts of the students. Teachers provide proper notes for students to study. Teaching is good.
review_content.Other: Culturals are conducted in our college by seniors. Management of our college is money minded.

content.Placements: They offer regular clinical postings, which will be useful during the internship period. And also internships. A college bus is arranged for postings. Postings are related to our department hospital. The person who takes operation theatre and anaesthesia technology is to maintain OT and assist anesthetist. I have to know how to handle advanced equipment.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is nice and protected for girls. Food and water are hygienic. The hostel has free Wi-Fi. A hostel with a gym is available. Ground with a track. Basketball court. individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good patient flow.

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Food served in the hostel is somewhat good but they don't provide proper food for breakfast and dinner. There is no proper water supply for hostelers for bathing.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good. Students can learn a lot from them. Class tests and seminars are conducted every week. They clear all the doubts of the students. Teachers provide proper notes for students to study. Teaching is good.
content.Other: Culturals are conducted in our college by seniors. Management of our college is money minded.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gangadhar Shastri Gune Ayurved Mahavidyalaya offers diverse programmes at UG level in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.A.M.S. Gangadhar Shastri Gune Ayurved Mahavidyalaya fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,97,225.

reviews_list.review_title: The oldest college in Maharashtra of about 110 years old.

review_content.Placements: The B.A.M.S. course is of 4 and half years and 1 year of internship. Role offered in our course is to trear patients by Ayurveda.
review_content.Infrastructure: Perception of our college and hostel is not too good and not too bad. It is just a normal college campus but can be improved. My first experience was very hectic when I saw the campus first time but now I think it's good as compared to the other ayurveda colleges.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members on the campus are very highly educated and highlight their jobs. Our course is basically about medical education which is ancient and priceless. They are doctors who study and also diagnose the diseases of patients visiting the hospital. Our college is very good and in our college, there is very good OPD. Many people come here that are not treated by modern medicine.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Not too good, not too bad, but as it is a government college, therefore it has demand and overrated.

review_content.Placements: As this is a medical college, therefore there is no chance of placement and no permanent job, but there is a 1-year internship in college as well as in rural areas with a stipend and hospital in the app for consultation with the internship in yours.
review_content.Infrastructure: Not too good, not too bad, it is medium in infrastructure quality. The hostel is also not too good, not too bad. It has 12k per year fees, according to which it's good. That's all I can say there is no good news today in the app; we can come to the office for consultation.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery(BAMS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The best place to study Ayurved.

review_content.Placements: The college provides education in the B.A. MS course based on traditional medicine Ayurved. Placements in the government sector for practitioners are very good. Students make much money on the private side also. Students get a salary package of 4.5 LPA - 9 LPA for government jobs in India. The role offered for freshers is a medical officer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is spread over 11 acres of land. It has a pharmacy lab and a hospital. The panchakarma and gynecology departments of the hospital have a good patient flow. The OT of the hospital is busy with operations. There is a well-structured college building. Compared to other colleges in Maharashtra, this college, which has a QCI ranking of A, holds the 3rd place among all colleges. It has good facilities in the dissection hall. There is a student library. A huge central library is present. All classrooms are modern. All departments are well-equipped. The hostel facility for both boys and girls is present. The boys' and girls' hostel intake is 200. The mess provides good food and is compulsory for hostel students.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with the college.

A mess is available on the college campus. The hostel is also good. There is no restriction in the hostel. There is an eco-friendly environment.

reviews.review_heading: The oldest college in Maharashtra of about 110 years old.
reviews.review_text: Perception of our college and hostel is not too good and not too bad. It is just a normal college campus but can be improved. My first experience was very hectic when I saw the campus first time but now I think it's good as compared to the other ayurveda colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Not too good, not too bad, but as it is a government college, therefore it has demand and overrated.
reviews.review_text: Not too good, not too bad, it is medium in infrastructure quality. The hostel is also not too good, not too bad. It has 12k per year fees, according to which it's good. That's all I can say there is no good news today in the app; we can come to the office for consultation.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to study Ayurved.
reviews.review_text: Our college is spread over 11 acres of land. It has a pharmacy lab and a hospital. The panchakarma and gynecology departments of the hospital have a good patient flow. The OT of the hospital is busy with operations. There is a well-structured college building. Compared to other colleges in Maharashtra, this college, which has a QCI ranking of A, holds the 3rd place among all colleges. It has good facilities in the dissection hall. There is a student library. A huge central library is present. Al...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied taking admission. Even the college has a good QCI rating as well AIR 74.
reviews.review_text: College is still developing. But the infrastructure of college is good. We have different departments. Each has a capacity of 50-60 students. The departments have models, charts, etc. A major attraction that colleges have dissection hall with respect to the anatomy department. Hostels are as expected from a government college.
